harness.js:15:2-20:5
> exec(cmd, opts, function(e, stdout, stderr) {
  if (e) { return cb(e); }
  if (stderr) { return cb(new Error(stderr)); }
  return cb(null, module["exports"]["parse"](path, stdout, opts));
});
